series_metadata.series_title: NURSING EDUCATION PROGRAM SURVEY REPORTS, PROGRAM RESPONSES AND PROGRESS REPORTS
series_metadata.series_description: Reports of surveys made of nursing education programs, program responses to survey visit reports, correspondence related to survey and/or responses, and progress reports.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: or subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later. ; Electronic: or subsequent survey visit is completed, whichever is later
